auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Statamic API token used as a Bearer token for the statamic.com Sites API. Create a token in your statamic.com account.

actions.name: create_site
actions.description: Create a Statamic site license with an optional domain or domains.

name.description: The display name of the Statamic site.

domain.description: A domain to license for the Statamic site.

items.description: A domain to license for the Statamic site.

domains.description: The domains to license for the Statamic site. The first domain is treated as production.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Statamic site. Provide either domain or domains, not both.

name.description: The site name returned by Statamic.

key.description: The site key returned by Statamic.

domains.description: The licensed domains returned by Statamic.

anyOf.description: The site creation timestamp returned by Statamic.

raw.description: The raw site object returned by Statamic.

outputSchema.description: The response returned with a Statamic site.

actions.name: delete_site
actions.description: Delete a Statamic site by site key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a Statamic site.

message.description: The deletion message returned by Statamic.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting a Statamic site.

actions.name: list_sites
actions.description: List Statamic sites available in the authenticated statamic.com account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Statamic sites.

name.description: The site name returned by Statamic.

key.description: The site key returned by Statamic.

domains.description: The licensed domains returned by Statamic.

anyOf.description: The site creation timestamp returned by Statamic.

raw.description: The raw site object returned by Statamic.

sites.description: The Statamic sites returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Statamic sites.

actions.name: update_site
actions.description: Update a Statamic site name or replace its licensed domain list.

name.description: The display name of the Statamic site.

domain.description: A domain to license for the Statamic site.

items.description: A domain to license for the Statamic site.

domains.description: The domains to license for the Statamic site. The first domain is treated as production.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Statamic site. Provide at least one of name, domain, or domains; provide either domain or domains, not both.

name.description: The site name returned by Statamic.

key.description: The site key returned by Statamic.

domains.description: The licensed domains returned by Statamic.

anyOf.description: The site creation timestamp returned by Statamic.

raw.description: The raw site object returned by Statamic.

outputSchema.description: The response returned with a Statamic site.
